subcodes.first_line: O remnant of Our most beauteous names! Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the direction of eternity, the seat of thy Lord, the Most Exalted, the Most Great [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا بقیه اسمائنا الحسنی اسمع ما یوحی الیک عن شطر القدم مقر ربک العلی العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
